assertions.description: shape-outside accepts a path() function value.
assertions.test: shape-outside: path('M 0 0 L 100 0 L 100 100 L 0 100 Z')

assertions.description: shape-outside accepts a shape() function value.
assertions.test: shape-outside: shape(from 0% 0%, line to 100% 0%, line to 100% 100%, line to 0% 100%, close)

assertions.description: Pre-existing circle() value still works on shape-outside.
Unknown function values must be rejected by shape-outside.
Setting shape-outside on a float'd block round-trips through getComputedStyle.
shape-outside with shape() can be animated via the Web Animations API.
assertions.test: (()=>{const e=document.createElement('div');e.style.cssFloat='left';e.style.width='100px';e.style.height='100px';document.body.appendChild(e);try{const a=e.animate([{shapeOutside:'shape(from 0% 0%, line to 100% 0%, line to 100% 100%, close)'},{shapeOutside:'shape(from 0% 0%, line to 100% 50%, line to 100% 100%, close)'}],{duration:100});a.cancel();e.remove();return true;}catch(_){e.remove();return false;}})()
